steps.title: Use the requested fact
steps.content: The student wants to specify when Ur formed. The relevant note gives the needed timing directly: Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago.

steps.title: Exclude non-timing details
steps.content: Choice A defines Ur as a supercontinent but gives no date. Choice C says only “long ago.” Choice D describes the general supercontinent cycle rather than Ur's formation time. The sentence with the precise age fulfills the goal. The answer is B.
